top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: GDP deflators at market prices, and money GDP June 2026 (Quarterly National Accounts)
top_signals.summary: This document contains the latest gross domestic product (GDP) deflators. The GDP deflator can be viewed as a measure of general inflation in the domestic economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Tankmaker KNDS Delays IPO as Investors Cool on Defense Stocks
top_signals.summary: Tankmaker KNDS postponed its initial public offering, as weakness in European defense stocks derailed what was expected to be the biggest first-time share sale in Europe this summer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Corporate report: Whole of Government Accounts 2025 to 2026: guidance for preparers
top_signals.summary: Guidance for central government and local government preparers for Whole of Government Accounts.

top_signals.title: Taiko reopens bridge after $1.7M exploit, says users made whole
top_signals.summary: Taiko restored bridge transfers after replenishing asset backing and completing security fixes following an 11-day network disruption.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Formula 1 worth £12bn to UK economy as Silverstone rakes in £100m
top_signals.summary: Formula 1 boosts the UK economy by £12bn every year, according to new figures revealed ahead of this weekend’s British Grand Prix at Silverstone. The wider impact in the UK of the elite motor racing series – 10 of whose 11 teams are headquartered in the country or have operational bases on these shores – [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
